findings.message: test_bindings_routes_reachable_via_create_app uses top-level create_app (not sub-app import); fixture writes real project.toml so create_app doesn't crash; POST assertion checks ==201, GET/PUT/audit assertions check not-404 and not-5xx (appropriate for routing-probe scope).

test_mount_order_longer_prefix_first uses AST-based parsing of app.py source to statically assert longer-prefix-before-shorter invariant; verified the test would detect the old bug (/api/runtime shadowing /api/runtime/bindings) on reconstructed old Mount order.

Mount order is correct: /api/runtime/bindings precedes /api/runtime. All 10 sub-app Mounts preserved. No hidden shadows: /api/v12/discussions has no prefix overlap with other Mounts; /api/gates shadows nothing; /api/projects Mount does not shadow page-level /projects Route entries (they are separate Route, not Mount).

Bare-prefix endpoints (/api/runtime, /api/setup, etc.) still 404 because sub-apps have no internal '/' route. This is documented in batch2_routes.md as correct behavior, not a shadow bug. Adding fake '/' routes is explicitly forbidden by #176. Deferring to future batch is acceptable.
Security quick scan: no eval/exec/hardcoded-secrets/SQL-concat/subprocess-shell found in diff. Single 'sqlite' hit in comment only.

No anti-patterns found: no assert True, no pytest.skip, no fake routes on runtime sub-app, no over-mocking, no ground-truth-from-impl. Test state properly reset via _reset_subapp_state() between tests.
Test docstrings reference #176 and S3. Evidence file (batch2_routes.md) explicitly traces to gap-analysis §3 P0-2, §4 Batch 2, §6 #5.
_Probe type alias is a plain tuple[str, str, str|None, dict|None] — functional but could be a NamedTuple for readability. Non-blocking.

_write_project_toml is intentionally duplicated from tests/e2e/test_v12_integration_e2e.py (avoids importing e2e conftest). If project.toml schema changes, both copies need updating. Consider extracting to shared integration conftest in future batch.

summary: PASS. All 3 commits (green + refactor + docs) reviewed. Production Mount order correct: /api/runtime/bindings now precedes /api/runtime. New tests (2/2 passed) use top-level create_app, not sub-app imports. Precedence smoke test catches old shadow bug on reconstructed input. No anti-patterns, no security issues, no fake routes. All 10 sub-app Mounts preserved. 397 unit + 8 integration tests green (0 regressions). 0 blocking concerns.
